item.title: Quarterly Earnings Review: March 2026 Results Show Broad Improvement Across Market Caps
item.description: The March 2026 quarter earnings season has delivered a marked improvement in corporate profitability, with 59.0% of the 738 companies reporting positive results, signalling a broad-based recovery across market capitalisation segments and sectors. This quarter’s earnings trajectory reflects a significant uptick compared to the preceding three quarters, underscoring strengthening business fundamentals and improving economic conditions. Time: May 10 2026 09:00 PM IST

item.title: Are Atlanta Electricals Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Atlanta Electricals Ltd's latest results are strong, with Q4 FY26 net sales of ₹747.62 crores and a net profit of ₹102.19 crores, reflecting significant growth in both revenue and profitability, alongside improved margins and capital efficiency. However, the stock is trading at a premium valuation compared to industry averages. Time: May 10 2026 07:13 PM IST

item.title: Are Advanced Enzyme Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Advanced Enzyme Technologies Ltd's latest results are positive, showing a 62.24% increase in net profit and a 21.65% rise in net sales for the quarter ended March 2026. However, concerns remain regarding its return on equity and margin consistency. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Sambhv Steel Tubes Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sambhv Steel Tubes Ltd's latest results are positive, showing a significant increase in net profit to ₹53.31 crores and net sales rising to ₹685.31 crores, indicating strong recovery and improved operational efficiency compared to the previous quarter. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Aarti Surfactants Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Aarti Surfactants Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 26.84% year-on-year, but a significant decline in net profit by 56.89% compared to last year raises concerns about profitability and operational challenges. Overall, while revenue is increasing, profitability pressures suggest potential issues for future stability. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales up 28.13% year-on-year, but declining operating margins and rising employee costs raise concerns about profitability. Overall, while revenue momentum is positive, challenges in operational efficiency may impact future financial health. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Utkarsh Small Finance Bank Ltd reported a net loss of ₹188.02 crores for Q4 FY26, indicating ongoing profitability challenges, despite a slight improvement in asset quality with gross NPAs decreasing to 7.71%. Overall, the results reflect significant operational difficulties, and investors should watch for future improvements. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Affle 3i Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Affle 3i Ltd's latest results show mixed performance, with net sales increasing by 20.28% year-on-year but profit growth slowing down, raising concerns about sustainability. While revenue growth remains strong, declining return on equity indicates challenges in capital efficiency. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Kewal Kiran Clothing Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Kewal Kiran Clothing Ltd's latest results show solid revenue growth with net sales up 12.38% year-on-year, but profitability has faced challenges, with a 9.25% quarter-on-quarter decline in net profit and reduced operating margins, indicating mixed performance overall. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Premier Polyfilm Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Premier Polyfilm Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year revenue growth of 11.87% and a net profit increase of 53.49%, but there are concerns due to a sequential decline in profit and operating margins, indicating operational challenges. Overall, while the company demonstrates solid capital efficiency, investors should monitor future performance for margin stability. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are D-Link India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: D-Link India Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales increasing by 12.27% quarter-on-quarter and 20.00% year-on-year, but profitability is under pressure, as operating and profit margins have declined. While net profit rose slightly, the company faces challenges that may impact future performance, warranting close investor attention. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Popular Estate Management Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Popular Estate Management Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a net loss of ₹0.07 crores in Q4 FY26 with no revenue generated, indicating ongoing operational challenges and a need for urgent strategic intervention. The negative Return on Equity and declining shareholder equity further highlight the company's financial difficulties. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Birla Corporation Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Birla Corporation Ltd's Q4 FY26 results are strong, with net sales up 31.38% quarter-on-quarter and net profit surging 458.72%. However, the annual performance shows a decline in sales and profit, indicating ongoing challenges in the cement industry. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Orient Paper & Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Orient Paper & Industries Ltd reported a net loss of ₹10.94 crores for Q4 FY26, despite a 5.56% year-on-year revenue growth to ₹231.47 crores. While there are signs of operational improvement, such as positive operating margins, ongoing losses and low return on equity indicate significant financial challenges. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Cil Securities Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: CIL Securities Ltd's latest results are concerning, with a 78.43% decline in net profit and a 16.02% drop in revenue, marking four consecutive quarters of revenue contraction and indicating significant operational challenges. The company is facing severe margin compression and struggles to generate adequate returns on shareholder capital. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Gujarat Ambuja Exports Ltd's latest results are mixed; while Q4 FY26 showed strong year-on-year growth in net profit and operating margins, the full-year performance for FY25 revealed a decline in sales and profit, indicating underlying challenges. Investors should watch future quarters to see if recent improvements can be sustained. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST

item.title: Are Sahyadri Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sahyadri Industries Ltd reported strong growth in net sales and profit for Q1 FY26, with net sales up 28.60% and net profit up 147.07%. However, concerns about performance volatility and declining efficiency metrics suggest caution for investors regarding the sustainability of this growth. Time: May 10 2026 07:12 PM IST
